trousers.alt: The School Shop grey trousers and shorts are  Regular leg fit with Teflon®, adjustable Waist ,Zip with hook and bar fastening Reinforced knees and Stay-up hems on the waist for extra comfort . Stain and Weatherproof finish repels water and stains and Crease Resistant material helps creases fall out easily. With an adjustable waist for perfect fit. Made with recycled polyester and responsibly sourced viscose.

skirts-senior.alt: The two pleats meduim length senior girls skirts .They’re designed in a a regular fit with smart permanent pleats that stay put and a comfortable adjustable waist. Our crease-resistant technology helps creases fall out easily, while a Stain & Weatherproof finish repels water and stains. Regular Fit – our classic regular fit.

skirts-pleated.alt:
The School Shop pleated skirts ! 
They’re designed in a a regular fit with smart permanent pleats that stay put and a comfortable adjustable waist. The  crease-resistant technology helps creases fall out easily, while a Stain & Weatherproof finish repels water and stains. Regular Fit – our classic regular fit.

uniforms-supplies.alt: Get your kids ready for success with top-quality uniforms and school supplies! 🎒👟 ✨ Shop at The School Shop for everything they need to start the school year strong. #BackToSchool #TheSchoolShop #UniformsAndSupplies #EducationEssentials

shirts.alt:
As seen here on our superstars ⭐️, with more cotton than ever, The School Shop slim fit blue and white short sleeve shirt is the ultimate school shirt its Non Iron and Stain Resistant, perfect for the day to day wear and tear of the school classroom. These shirts are slim fitting with a narrower cut that fits closer to the body. For those younger sizes (up to 8 years) these shirts feature our practical Easy Close top button - rip tape behind the top button makes dressing simple. Made with responsibly sourced cotton and recycled polyester.
Slim Fit- a 4cm narrower cut through the waist and/ or body. #schooluniform #schoolshop #kidsstore #uniforms #freetown
